TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Michel_Aoun, title = Michel_Aoun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michel_Aoun} }

S.FORM: Michel Aoun I 1933 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Michel Aoun, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Lebanon anini i ci Michel Aoun, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 31 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: mi ¶ńß…ô…ĺ ao~uo~u~un i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mi ¶ńß…ô…ĺ ao~uo~u~un, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u …ĺ…ôb~b~vano~un anini i ¶i mi ¶ńß…ô…ĺ ao~uo~u~un, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Michel Aoun I 1933 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Michel Aoun, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Lebanon anini i ci Michel Aoun, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 31 a romi'ad.
